title: C-01 Correction Code Execution Map
description: Evolved mapping of C-01 correction codes defined in c-01_correction_codes.json directly to callable execution paths within the DALEK CAAN kernel.

handler_path.description: File path or reference to the adaptive execution utility.

method.description: The specific function/method name to be invoked by the self-modifying kernel.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum allotted time for execution before raising a critical C01-TIME error.

saturation_level.description: Saturation level for this execution map, ranging from conservative to unbounded.

author: Craig — with two years of evolving code review
